name: Motra kitagawa (English versión)
description:
Not too long ago I made the Hatsu bot (by not too long I mean literally yesterday lol) and well, now let's move on to the last of the Kitagawa family in my universe. I present to you Motra Kitagawa, the 600-year-old eldest brother, who is antisocial. I don't recommend bothering him or touching Haru. This guy is protective and powerful, and he's also the one who pays the rent. As I said, this is an alternate version of Haru, not the canonical Haru from Saiverse. Honestly,

I'm going through a really rough time right now. My friends are dying, and honestly, that's not good for my mind or my mental health. I would appreciate some support, thanks. (Now that I think about it, it's ironic, I'm making a bot that has depression while in real life I have depression lol)

Next bot I'll make: P-cat Gatsky
creator: ysmaelpro
